property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.11 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C: lutter in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C: lutter in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1.3 in;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.16 in;C:\Users\Windows11\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE in;c:\Users\Windows11\.antigravity-ide\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Example #1.3
testcase.system-out:

15:57:50.512 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-1] INFO c.b.group2.utils.ConfigManager - Loading configuration for environment: dev 15:57:50.565 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-1] INFO com.bootcamp.group2.hooks.Hooks - Suite started | env=dev | platform=WEB

testcase.name: Mobile login fails with empty password
Mobile login fails with empty email
Mobile login fails with unregistered email
Mobile login fails with incorrect password
Mobile login successful with valid credentials
Forgot Password button is visible on mobile login page
Berhasil mengajukan cuti
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: Reset form cuti
